content: Our paper "Action-Aware Multimodal Wavelet Fusion Network for Quantitative Elbow Motor Function Assessment Using sEMG and Robotic Kinematics" accepted by Sensors.
My first-author paper "Thinking Like Clinicians: Ranking-based MIL for PPG-based Hemodynamic Fluctuation Detection" accepted by Pattern Recognition.
Our paper "Unleashing the Power of Pretrained Transformer for Dense Prediction in Physiological Signals" accepted by IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics.
Presented "Gaze and Go" at IEEE ICRA 2025, Atlanta, GA.
Honored as Outstanding Student (1/5), Dept. of BME, Fudan University.

My first-author paper "Gaze and Go: Harnessing Visual Attention Valence in Upper-Limb Robotic Rehabilitation with Tailored Gamification and Eye Tracking for Neuroplasticity" accepted by IEEE ICRA 2025.
Joined ArkAI Lab, ZDriod Medical as a Research Intern (Aug. 2024 - Dec. 2025).
Our paper "Efficient multi-view fusion and flexible adaptation to view missing in cardiovascular system signals" accepted by Neural Networks.
Honored as Outstanding Student Cadre (sole recipient), Dept. of BME, Fudan University.

My first-author paper "PM2ECGCN: Parallelized spatial-temporal structures of multi-lead ECG with graph convolution network for multi-center cardiac disease diagnosis" accepted by Expert Systems with Applications.
My first-author paper "Diffusion model with self-supervised training for subject-aware PPG recovery" accepted by IEEE BioCAS 2023.
Received Outstanding Graduate of Shanghai (sole recipient, Dept. of EE, Class of 2023).
Our paper "PPG-based blood pressure estimation can benefit from scalable multi-scale fusion neural networks and multi-task learning" accepted by Biomedical Signal Processing and Control.
My first-author paper "Biometric recognition based on scalable end-to-end convolutional neural network using photoplethysmography: A comparative study" accepted by Computers in Biology and Medicine.
